reference_answer: Memo IA-17 confirmed that cart C-7 was inspected by Lina Park at 09:15.
The audit resolved the projector absence as a checkout issue rather than a theft issue.
Door sensor evidence showing no closet opening after 17:00 ruled out after-hours removal.
The shelf photos excluded shelf misplacement as the explanation.
The trainer's return time is unknown.
The charging-cable serial number is unstated for cart C-7.
The battery-failure claim is unsupported because the packet contains no battery test, no charging log, and no technician note.
Status checked out to trainer superseded the lost-equipment label.
